title: Flyrr's Paxels
description: Adds the Paxel tool, a combination of pickaxes, shovels and axes to the game!
body:
## Introduction This Datapack adds **Paxels**, a combination of **P**ickaxe, **Axe** and Shov**el**, which can efficiently mine all blocks which can be mined by Pickaxes, Axes and Shovels! (...as you can probably guess...) They behave just like any of the three tools when it comes to enchanting and also have any additional abilities like stripping logs and disabling shields like axes do :) ## Crafting You can craft them by simply putting a Pickaxe, Axe and Shovel of the desired material in the crafting grid of either your inventory or a crafting table. ![Crafting a diamond paxel using a diamond axe, diamond pickaxe and diamond shovel!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c77bab2026ec935ef4d37a4b6e85a707747d4a77.png) To upgrade a Diamond Paxel to Netherite just combine it with a Netherite Ingot and a Template in a Smithing Table ## Required Recourcepack While the datapack doesn't exactly "require" the Recourcepack to work, it's highly reccomended to use it to see the paxel's custom texture! ## Interested in making your own datapacks? :) I am part of a small team of people owning **Datapack Hub**, the perfect discord server for helping you do just that! Wether you are just getting started or have advanced questions, with 1700+ members and our team of verified helpers we got you covered!
(This is 100% a passion project and I don't get paid anything for promoting this :))
[![Click here to join the Datapack Hub Discord server!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/732bc1ebde78aeed750745d52cb9089900b63d9a.png)](https://discord.com/invite/aEXsdjjdu4) ## Need a minecraft server? Click the below image and use my promo code "Flynecraft" to get 25% off of minecraft servers hosted by Bisect Hosting, covering top tier performance and exceptional customer support at any time!
[![Click here to join the Datapack Hub Discord server!](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/4bd12851-1bde-4edc-850d-709bae8cd4dd.webp)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/flynecraft) **Note: This pack was previously simply called "Paxels", I renamed it to "Flyrr's Paxels" to avoid confusion with other packs! This might be the one you're looking for :P**
